acceptance_results.criterion: Tenant-key-only report identity resolves to tenant_id.
acceptance_results.reason: parseFilters now resolves tenant keys via ReportsRepository.TenantIDByKey for tenant-scoped and platform-scoped identities.

acceptance_results.criterion: all_tenants=true remains forbidden for tenant identities.
acceptance_results.reason: The all_tenants branch still rejects non-platform identities before tenant key resolution.
A missing tenant key resolves to tenant_unavailable 403 instead of an unscoped report.

cleanup_notes: Live acquisition-api was rebuilt and restarted on port 8084.
Live runtime was launched with ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_PLATFORM_EMAILS aligned to the web admin development bootstrap.
No frontend, dependency, compose, go.mod, or go.sum files were changed.
commits: db2b9af merge: report tenant key scope fix
completed_work: Created TMP-057 defect slice and work order.
Updated reports filter parsing to resolve tenant keys through the tenant catalog.
Added handler tests for tenant-scoped tenant key resolution and unknown tenant key rejection.
Rebuilt and restarted live acquisition-api on port 8084 with the backend bootstrap admin emails set.
known_gaps: The authenticated browser request must be retried by the operator because the agent does not have the Auth0 browser token.
operator_message: TMP-057 is complete: acquisition-api reporting can resolve tenant-key report scope and the live service is running on 8084.
risk_notes: The runtime bootstrap email setting is process-level for the current live start; make/system service definitions should carry ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_PLATFORM_EMAILS for future restarts.
The access token must include email and email_verified for backend bootstrap platform scope to apply.
summary: Fixed acquisition-api admin reporting scope resolution so tenant-key-only identities resolve to a canonical tenant_id before report queries run, while preserving the platform-only all_tenants guard.

validation.output_excerpt: TMP-057 classified vertical_defect_slice; assignment_decision allow; no blocking reasons.
ok true; only known superseded stale ledger warning for TMP-011-repair-1 and TMP-015-repair-1.

validation.command: OPTIONS http://127.0.0.1:8084/v1/admin/reports/kpis with Origin http://localhost:4200 and Access-Control-Request-Headers authorization,x-tenant-key
